id.description: The unique identifier for the plan.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for the plan amount.

trialDays.description: The number of trial days for the plan.

monthlyRevenue.description: The monthly revenue for the plan.

lifetimeValue.description: The lifetime value of the plan.

averageLifetimeValue.description: The average lifetime value of the plan.

subscriberCount.description: The number of subscribers for the plan.

activeTrialCount.description: The number of active trials for the plan.

flexBilling.description: Whether the plan has flexible billing.

deprecatedAt.description: The date when the plan was deprecated.

customerId.description: The customer ID associated with the plan.

customerTags.description: The tags associated with the customer.

customerExcludeTags.description: The tags to exclude for the customer.

customFields.description: The custom fields associated with the plan.

shopifyPlans.description: The Shopify plans associated with the plan.

createdAt.description: The creation date of the plan.

updatedAt.description: The last update date of the plan.
